name: phase22_msa_authoring_prompt_bank_v1
purpose: Authoring prompts for Sami to create or approve MSA dialogue review exports during Phase 22.
notes: This file is a non-training authoring aid.
Do not copy this file into data/corpus/chat/jsonl.
A prompt becomes useful only when Sami writes or approves the actual dialogue in the UI export loop.

msa: اشرح الفرق بين runtime وtraining وtokenizer بلغة فصحى بسيطة.
